read_policy: Use this file for active backlog, next actions, scanner counts, and stable debt ids. Do not reread archived markdown history unless a debt id points there.

notes: The one widget timing match is the intentional centralized pumpFeatureUi helper.
Feature tappable scanner now skips built-in labeled buttons, tooltipped controls, and tappables already wrapped in Semantics or Tooltip.
Legacy spacing scanner is split between canonical 4-point migration candidates and intentional fine-grained compatibility helpers.
Canonical spacing migration should be piecemeal and touch-driven.

pending.title: Fix profile tab and preview tab blank rendering
pending.summary: The null-profile blank branch now renders an explicit missing-profile state, profile canonical spacing is migrated, and ProfileScreen now uses one sliver-native CustomScrollView with a pinned Profile/Preview tab row instead of NestedScrollView + TabBarView. On 2026-05-06 the iPhone debug loop reproduced a profile edit-sheet lifecycle crash (`TextEditingController was used after being disposed`) during profile interaction. `profile_edit_sheet.dart` now owns text/int controllers inside the modal route, regression tests cover Done dismissal, and a post-hot-restart log window had no fresh controller/RenderBox/RenderFlex/provider errors. If the profile body is still visually blank, first register/export the printed App Check debug token or rerun with `FIREBASE_APP_CHECK_DEBUG_TOKEN`, then inspect provider data and preview constraints.

pending.title: Audit retained tab and route streams for lifecycle ownership
pending.summary: Dashboard booked-runs failed because a healthy realtime Firestore listener was wrapped in an idle Stream.timeout. The timeout class is fixed for run and run-club providers, and no remaining lib Stream.timeout usage targets Firestore listeners. Next pass should classify every screen-backed stream as global, route-owned autoDispose, prewarmed keepAlive, or retained-tab gated. Pay special attention to StateShellRoute.indexedStack branches: Clubs list/detail, Chats list/detail, Catches, Profile, and Home. Keep shell-level streams only when they drive shell-wide UI such as auth, current user, connectivity, or unread badges. Add fake-time lifecycle tests when a provider is intentionally kept or paused.

pending.title: Create and migrate to branded app error surfaces
pending.summary: We have a branded Flutter framework error fallback (`CatchFrameworkErrorView`) and inline primitives (`ErrorBanner`, `MutationErrorSnackbarListener`, `CatchEmptyState`), but no canonical app-facing full-screen/sliver/inline error surface. Many AsyncValue error branches still use bare `CatchErrorText`, `Center(Text(...))`, or local message cards. Build a branded error primitive family with retry support, then migrate dashboard, run clubs, chats, swipes, payments, settings, routing, run detail, run map, attendance, public profile, and profile surfaces in focused batches.

pending.title: Keep docs index and registry synchronized
pending.summary: Whenever a durable doc owner is added, renamed, archived, deleted, or assigned a new recurring rule, update docs/README.md, doc_versions.json, doc_summaries.json, rules.json, and any affected owner doc in the same pass.

completed.title: Audit remaining feature tappable candidates
completed.summary: Reviewed the 24 syntactic tappable candidates. Existing controls already had user-visible text, tooltips, or Semantics wrappers, so the useful fix was scanner refinement. The scanner now reports zero unresolved tappable candidates.

completed.title: Piecemeal legacy spacing migration
completed.summary: Migrated all canonical 4-point Sizes.p* presentation/widget candidates to CatchSpacing.s*. The scanner now reports zero canonical candidates; fine-grained p2/p6/p10/p14/p18 compatibility helpers remain watch-only.
